Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and mild hyperchloremia. Liver enzymes are mostly normal except for a slight ALT increase. Lipid profile reveals elevated total cholesterol, LDL, and triglycerides, indicating increased cardiovascular risk. Globulin is low, which may warrant further evaluation. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further assessment of renal and cardiovascular status.
